testCase.name: AuthService should be defined
AuthService verifyOtpAndAuthenticate existing user login should authenticate existing user successfully
AuthService verifyOtpAndAuthenticate existing user login should throw UnauthorizedException for inactive user
AuthService verifyOtpAndAuthenticate new user registration should register new user successfully
AuthService verifyOtpAndAuthenticate new user registration should handle user creation failure
AuthService verifyOtpAndAuthenticate OTP verification failures should throw UnauthorizedException for invalid OTP
AuthService verifyOtpAndAuthenticate OTP verification failures should handle MSG91 service errors during verification
AuthService validateJwtPayload should validate JWT payload successfully
AuthService validateJwtPayload should throw UnauthorizedException for invalid user ID
AuthService validateJwtPayload should throw UnauthorizedException for inactive user
AuthService edge cases and error handling should handle database errors gracefully
AuthService edge cases and error handling should handle JWT signing errors
AuthService integration scenarios should handle concurrent authentication requests
AuthService integration scenarios should maintain phone number format consistency
AuthController should be defined
AuthController verifyOtp should verify OTP and authenticate user successfully
AuthController verifyOtp should handle authentication failure
AuthController verifyOtp should handle service errors
AppController root should return welcome message wrapper
Auth Guards and Strategies JwtAuthGuard should be defined
Auth Guards and Strategies RolesGuard should be defined
Auth Guards and Strategies RolesGuard should allow access when no roles are required
Auth Guards and Strategies RolesGuard should allow access when user has required role
Auth Guards and Strategies RolesGuard should deny access when user does not have required role
Auth Guards and Strategies JwtStrategy should be defined
Auth Guards and Strategies JwtStrategy should validate JWT payload successfully
Auth Guards and Strategies JwtStrategy should throw UnauthorizedException for invalid payload
Msg91Service Service with valid config should be defined
UsersService should be defined
UsersService create should create a user successfully
UsersService create should throw ConflictException when user already exists
UsersService findOne should find user by ID successfully
UsersService findOne should throw NotFoundException when user not found
UsersService findByPhone should find user by phone successfully
UsersService findByPhone should return null when user not found
UsersService update should update user successfully
UsersService update should throw NotFoundException when user not found
UsersService findAll should return all users
